title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Fabindia Online

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Fabindia Online
jsonLd.description:
Fabindia Online invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Category Manager at our Srinagar location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Fabindia Online:
Fabindia Online is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Fabindia Online!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
